values.name: Conceptual Commitment
values.use_when: the author is constrained by inherited concepts or theoretical commitments.

values.name: Audience Expectation
values.use_when: the later work must accommodate a readership or discourse horizon.

values.name: Methodological Lock-In
values.use_when: an inherited method constrains available moves.

values.name: Rhetorical Position
values.use_when: the author is constrained by how they must publicly position the argument.

values.name: Institutional Role
values.use_when: the constraint comes from disciplinary, political, or institutional location.
